content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-improvement pipeline can be adapted to ground multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms by using successive refinement cycles to resolve contradictions across different inconsistent solving perspectives. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while fixing the limitation of current multi-perspective reflection that often stops at identifying inconsistent outputs without structured convergence to a better final result.
